meaning: a very large oceanic bird with long, narrow wings
definition: a very large oceanic bird with long, narrow wings
example: The albatross glided over the ocean for hours without flapping its wings.
exampleHindi: अल्बाट्रॉस अपने पंख फड़फड़ाए बिना घंटों तक समुद्र में उड़ता रहा।

meaning: a small seabird famous for its extremely long migration from the Arctic to the Antarctic
definition: a small seabird famous for its extremely long migration from the Arctic to the Antarctic
example: The Arctic tern experiences two summers each year.
exampleHindi: आर्कटिक टर्न में प्रत्येक वर्ष दो ग्रीष्मकाल का अनुभव होता है।

meaning: a short-winged diving seabird found in northern oceans
definition: a short-winged diving seabird found in northern oceans
example: The little auk spent most of the winter at sea.
exampleHindi: छोटे औक ने सर्दियों का अधिकांश समय समुद्र में बिताया।

meaning: a tropical bird known for the male's spectacular plumage and elaborate courtship displays
definition: a tropical bird known for the male's spectacular plumage and elaborate courtship displays
example: The male bird of paradise performed a complex dance to attract a mate.
exampleHindi: स्वर्ग के नर पक्षी ने एक साथी को आकर्षित करने के लिए एक जटिल नृत्य किया।

meaning: a common thrush, the male of which is black with an orange or yellow bill
definition: a common thrush, the male of which is black with an orange or yellow bill
example: A blackbird was singing beautifully at dawn.
exampleHindi: भोर के समय एक काली चिड़िया सुन्दर गा रही थी।

meaning: a widely distributed warbler, the male having a black crown and the female a reddish-brown one
definition: a widely distributed warbler, the male having a black crown and the female a reddish-brown one
example: The blackcap is sometimes called the 'northern nightingale'.
exampleHindi: ब्लैककैप को कभी-कभी 'उत्तरी नाइटिंगेल' भी कहा जाता है।

meaning: a North American jay with predominantly blue plumage
definition: a North American jay with predominantly blue plumage
example: A noisy blue jay chased the smaller birds away from the feeder.
exampleHindi: एक शोर मचाती नीली जय ने छोटे पक्षियों को फीडर से दूर भगा दिया।

meaning: a tropical seabird similar to a gannet, known for its plunge-diving and sometimes blue feet
definition: a tropical seabird similar to a gannet, known for its plunge-diving and sometimes blue feet
example: The blue-footed booby performed an unusual high-stepping dance.
exampleHindi: नीले पैरों वाली बूबी ने एक असामान्य हाई-स्टेपिंग नृत्य प्रस्तुत किया।

meaning: a harsh, clucking sound made by certain birds, like hens or geese
definition: a harsh, clucking sound made by certain birds, like hens or geese
example: The geese started to cackle loudly as we approached.
exampleHindi: जैसे ही हम पास आये, हंस जोर-जोर से चिल्लाने लगे।

meaning: a large North American wild goose with a brown body, black head and neck, and white cheek patches
definition: a large North American wild goose with a brown body, black head and neck, and white cheek patches
example: A V-shaped flock of Canada geese honked loudly overhead.
exampleHindi: कैनेडा गीज़ का वी-आकार का झुंड सिर के ऊपर जोर-जोर से हॉर्न बजा रहा था।

meaning: a North American bird, the male of which has bright red plumage and a pointed crest
definition: a North American bird, the male of which has bright red plumage and a pointed crest
example: The bright red cardinal stood out against the white snow.
exampleHindi: चमकदार लाल कार्डिनल सफेद बर्फ के सामने खड़ा था।

meaning: a very large flightless bird native to the forests of New Guinea and northeastern Australia
definition: a very large flightless bird native to the forests of New Guinea and northeastern Australia
example: The cassowary is considered one of the most dangerous birds in the world.
exampleHindi: कैसोवरी को दुनिया के सबसे खतरनाक पक्षियों में से एक माना जाता है।

meaning: the harsh cry of a crow or raven
definition: the harsh cry of a crow or raven
example: The crow's harsh caw warned the other birds of a predator.
exampleHindi: कौवे की कठोर काँव-काँव ने अन्य पक्षियों को शिकारी होने की चेतावनी दी।

meaning: a series of short, quick high-pitched sounds
definition: a series of short, quick high-pitched sounds
example: The sparrows kept up a constant chatter in the bushes.
exampleHindi: गौरैया झाड़ियों में लगातार चहचहाती रहती थी।

meaning: a small North American bird with a dark cap and a distinctive call
definition: a small North American bird with a dark cap and a distinctive call
example: The chickadee boldly took a seed from her hand.
exampleHindi: चिकडे ने साहसपूर्वक उसके हाथ से एक बीज ले लिया।

meaning: a small leaf warbler that breeds in open woods, known for its repetitive song
definition: a small leaf warbler that breeds in open woods, known for its repetitive song
example: The chiffchaff is one of the first migrants to arrive in spring.
exampleHindi: शिफ़चैफ़ वसंत ऋतु में आने वाले पहले प्रवासियों में से एक है।

meaning: a parrot with an erectile crest, native to Australasia
definition: a parrot with an erectile crest, native to Australasia
example: The cockatoo raised its bright yellow crest in alarm.
exampleHindi: कॉकटू ने घबराकर अपनी चमकीली पीली कलगी उठायी।

meaning: a soft murmuring sound made by a dove or pigeon
definition: a soft murmuring sound made by a dove or pigeon
example: The gentle coo of the mourning dove is very relaxing.
exampleHindi: शोक मना रहे कबूतर की कोमल कूक बहुत आरामदायक होती है।

meaning: a large, dark-colored diving bird with a long neck
definition: a large, dark-colored diving bird with a long neck
example: The cormorant stood on a rock with its wings spread to dry.
exampleHindi: जलकाग सूखने के लिए अपने पंख फैलाए एक चट्टान पर खड़ा था।

meaning: a large, completely black bird with a loud, harsh call

example: The crow let out a loud caw from the treetop.
exampleHindi: कौवे ने पेड़ की चोटी से जोर से काँव-काँव की आवाज निकाली।

meaning: a medium-sized long-tailed bird, noted for its call and for laying its eggs in the nests of other birds

example: The arrival of the cuckoo is often seen as a sign of spring.
exampleHindi: कोयल के आगमन को अक्सर वसंत ऋतु के संकेत के रूप में देखा जाता है।

meaning: a stocky seed- or fruit-eating bird, often used as a symbol of peace
definition: a stocky seed- or fruit-eating bird, often used as a symbol of peace
example: A white dove was released at the ceremony.
exampleHindi: समारोह में एक सफेद कबूतर छोड़ा गया।

meaning: à¤šà¥€à¤²
definition: à¤šà¥€à¤²
example: An eagle can fly very high.
exampleHindi: बाज बहुत ऊँचा उड़ सकता है।

meaning: a large northern marine duck, the female of which plucks down from her breast to line her nest
definition: a large northern marine duck, the female of which plucks down from her breast to line her nest
example: The eider duck's feathers are prized for their warmth.
exampleHindi: ईडर बत्तख के पंख उनकी गर्माहट के लिए बेशकीमती हैं।

meaning: a bird of prey with long pointed wings and a notched beak
definition: a bird of prey with long pointed wings and a notched beak
example: The peregrine falcon dove at incredible speeds.
exampleHindi: पेरेग्रीन बाज़ अविश्वसनीय गति से कबूतर उड़ाता है।

meaning: a seed-eating songbird that typically has a stout bill and colorful plumage
definition: a seed-eating songbird that typically has a stout bill and colorful plumage
example: A small finch joined the others at the birdbath.
exampleHindi: एक छोटा सा फिंच पक्षी-स्नान में दूसरों के साथ शामिल हो गया।

meaning: a tropical seabird with long wings and a deeply forked tail, the male having a large red throat pouch
definition: a tropical seabird with long wings and a deeply forked tail, the male having a large red throat pouch
example: The frigatebird inflated its bright red pouch to attract a female.
exampleHindi: फ्रिगेटबर्ड ने मादा को आकर्षित करने के लिए अपनी चमकदार लाल थैली को फुलाया।

meaning: a seabird that resembles a gull but is related to the petrels, flying with stiff wingbeats
definition: a seabird that resembles a gull but is related to the petrels, flying with stiff wingbeats
example: The fulmar nested on a precarious cliff ledge.

meaning: a large seabird with mainly white plumage, catching fish by plunge-diving
definition: a large seabird with mainly white plumage, catching fish by plunge-diving
example: The gannet folded its wings and dived straight into the sea.
exampleHindi: गैनेट ने अपने पंख मोड़े और सीधे समुद्र में गोता लगा दिया।

meaning: a diving duck with a large head, the male having dark plumage with a white patch on the face
definition: a diving duck with a large head, the male having dark plumage with a white patch on the face
example: The common goldeneye performs an elaborate courtship display.
exampleHindi: आम सुनहरी आँख एक विस्तृत प्रेमालाप प्रदर्शन करती है।

meaning: a small seed-eating finch, the male of which has a yellow body in summer
definition: a small seed-eating finch, the male of which has a yellow body in summer
example: The goldfinch perched lightly on the thistle.
exampleHindi: गोल्डफिंच थीस्ल पर हल्के से बैठा।

meaning: another name for the murre or similar seabirds of the auk family
definition: another name for the murre or similar seabirds of the auk family
example: The black guillemot carried a fish back to its chick.
exampleHindi: काला गिल्मोट एक मछली को वापस उसके चूज़े के पास ले गया।

meaning: a bird of prey with broad rounded wings and a long tail
definition: a bird of prey with broad rounded wings and a long tail
example: A hawk circled slowly in the sky searching for prey.
exampleHindi: एक बाज़ शिकार की तलाश में धीरे-धीरे आकाश में चक्कर लगा रहा था।

meaning: the loud, harsh cry of a goose
definition: the loud, harsh cry of a goose
example: We could hear the honk of the geese flying south.
exampleHindi: हम दक्षिण की ओर उड़ रहे हंसों की हाहाकार सुन सकते थे।

meaning: a distinctively patterned bird with a prominent fan-like crest and a long, curved bill
definition: a distinctively patterned bird with a prominent fan-like crest and a long, curved bill
example: The hoopoe prodded the ground looking for insects.
exampleHindi: घेरा कीड़ों की तलाश में ज़मीन पर घूमा।

meaning: a tropical bird with a very large, curved bill that often has a casque on the upper mandible
definition: a tropical bird with a very large, curved bill that often has a casque on the upper mandible
example: The great hornbill fed its mate through a small slit in the tree trunk.
exampleHindi: ग्रेट हॉर्नबिल अपने साथी को पेड़ के तने में एक छोटे से छेद के माध्यम से खाना खिलाता था।

meaning: a small nectar-feeding tropical bird that is able to hover and fly backward
definition: a small nectar-feeding tropical bird that is able to hover and fly backward
example: A tiny hummingbird hovered near the red flowers.
exampleHindi: एक नन्हा हमिंगबर्ड लाल फूलों के पास मँडरा रहा था।

meaning: a brightly colored bird that dives for fish, often having blue plumage and a long beak
definition: a brightly colored bird that dives for fish, often having blue plumage and a long beak
example: A sudden flash of blue revealed a kingfisher diving into the river.
exampleHindi: अचानक नीले रंग की चमक से पता चला कि एक किंगफिशर नदी में गोता लगा रहा है।

meaning: a small gull that nests in colonies on sea cliffs, having a distinctive call
definition: a small gull that nests in colonies on sea cliffs, having a distinctive call
example: Thousands of kittiwakes crowded the noisy nesting cliff.
exampleHindi: हज़ारों किटीवेक शोर मचाने वाली घोंसले वाली चट्टान पर जमा हो गए।

meaning: a flightless, nocturnal bird of New Zealand with hair-like feathers and a long, downward-curved bill
definition: a flightless, nocturnal bird of New Zealand with hair-like feathers and a long, downward-curved bill
example: The elusive kiwi foraged for grubs in the dark.
exampleHindi: मायावी कीवी अंधेरे में ग्रब की तलाश में है।

meaning: a large Australasian kingfisher known for its call, which sounds like loud laughter
definition: a large Australasian kingfisher known for its call, which sounds like loud laughter
example: The kookaburra's laugh echoed through the bushland.
exampleHindi: कूकाबूरा की हँसी झाड़ियों में गूँज उठी।

meaning: an Australian ground-dwelling bird known for its extraordinary ability to mimic natural and artificial sounds
definition: an Australian ground-dwelling bird known for its extraordinary ability to mimic natural and artificial sounds
example: The lyrebird flawlessly imitated the sound of a camera shutter.
exampleHindi: लिरेबर्ड ने कैमरे के शटर की ध्वनि की त्रुटिहीन नकल की।

meaning: a large, long-tailed parrot with brightly colored plumage
definition: a large, long-tailed parrot with brightly colored plumage
example: The scarlet macaw flew swiftly through the rainforest canopy.
exampleHindi: लाल रंग का मकोय तेजी से वर्षावन की छत्रछाया से उड़ गया।

meaning: a long-tailed crow with boldly marked plumage and a raucous voice
definition: a long-tailed crow with boldly marked plumage and a raucous voice
example: The magpie swooped down to steal a shiny coin.
exampleHindi: मैगपाई ने एक चमकदार सिक्का चुराने के लिए झपट्टा मारा।

meaning: a wild duck, the male having a glossy green head and white collar
definition: a wild duck, the male having a glossy green head and white collar
example: The mallard ducklings followed their mother into the pond.
exampleHindi: मल्लार्ड बत्तखें अपनी माँ के पीछे-पीछे तालाब में चली गईं।

meaning: a fish-eating diving duck with a long, thin, serrated bill
definition: a fish-eating diving duck with a long, thin, serrated bill
example: The red-breasted merganser chased a small fish underwater.
exampleHindi: लाल स्तन वाले मर्गेंसर ने पानी के भीतर एक छोटी मछली का पीछा किया।

meaning: a black and white auk that breeds in large colonies on cliffs
definition: a black and white auk that breeds in large colonies on cliffs
example: The common murre laid its egg directly on the bare rock.
exampleHindi: कॉमन मुर्रे ने अपना अंडा सीधे नंगी चट्टान पर दिया।

meaning: a small migratory thrush known for its powerful and beautiful song, often heard at night
definition: a small migratory thrush known for its powerful and beautiful song, often heard at night
example: The nightingale sang sweetly from the thicket in the moonlight.
exampleHindi: चांदनी रात में घने जंगल से बुलबुल मधुर स्वर में गा रही थी।

meaning: a small bird that climbs up and down tree trunks in search of insects
definition: a small bird that climbs up and down tree trunks in search of insects
example: I watched the nuthatch climb headfirst down the tree.
exampleHindi: मैंने नटहैच को पेड़ से नीचे सिर के बल चढ़ते हुए देखा।

meaning: a colorful bird, typically with bright yellow or orange and black plumage
definition: a colorful bird, typically with bright yellow or orange and black plumage
example: A Baltimore oriole wove a hanging nest in the elm tree.
exampleHindi: बाल्टीमोर ओरिओल ने एल्म के पेड़ पर एक लटकता हुआ घोंसला बनाया।

example: The ostrich is the largest bird in the world.
exampleHindi: शुतुरमुर्ग विश्व का सबसे बड़ा पक्षी है।

meaning: à¤‰à¤²à¥à¤²à¥‚
definition: à¤‰à¤²à¥à¤²à¥‚
example: An owl can see in the dark.
exampleHindi: उल्लू अँधेरे में देख सकता है.

meaning: a coastal wading bird with black and white plumage and a long, stout orange or red bill
definition: a coastal wading bird with black and white plumage and a long, stout orange or red bill
example: The oystercatcher used its strong bill to pry open a mussel.
exampleHindi: सीप पकड़ने वाले ने सीप को खोलने के लिए अपनी मजबूत चोंच का उपयोग किया।

example: The peacock is dancing in the rain.

meaning: a small seabird that flies low over the sea, often following ships

meaning: a large long-tailed game bird, the male of which has showy plumage

example: A colorful pheasant ran across the country lane.

example: The elegant northern pintail took flight from the marsh.

meaning: a diving duck, the male having a reddish-brown head and grey back

example: The pochard dived deep into the lake to find aquatic plants.

example: The puffin returned to its burrow with a beak full of sandeels.
exampleHindi: पफिन सेंडिल्स से भरी चोंच के साथ अपने बिल में लौट आया।

meaning: a small bird with a red or orange breast
definition: a small bird with a red or orange breast
example: The robin was digging for worms in the garden.
exampleHindi: रॉबिन बगीचे में कीड़े खोज रहा था।

meaning: a loud, harsh, piercing cry, often made by owls or raptors
definition: a loud, harsh, piercing cry, often made by owls or raptors
example: The barn owl emitted an eerie screech as it flew over the field.
exampleHindi: खलिहान उल्लू ने मैदान के ऊपर से उड़ते हुए एक भयानक चीख निकाली।

meaning: a common name for various types of gulls, typically having grey and white plumage
definition: a common name for various types of gulls, typically having grey and white plumage
example: A seagull snatched the french fry right out of his hand.
exampleHindi: एक सीगल ने सीधे उसके हाथ से फ्रेंच फ्राइज़ छीन लिया।

meaning: a medium-sized seabird that glides on stiff wings low over the water
definition: a medium-sized seabird that glides on stiff wings low over the water
example: Flocks of shearwaters migrated along the coastline.
exampleHindi: शियरवॉटर के झुंड समुद्र तट के किनारे चले गए।

meaning: a widely distributed duck with a broad spatulate bill used for sifting food from the water
definition: a widely distributed duck with a broad spatulate bill used for sifting food from the water
example: The shoveler skimmed the surface of the water with its unique bill.
exampleHindi: फावड़ा चलाने वाले ने अपनी अनोखी चोंच से पानी की सतह को छू लिया।

meaning: a high-pitched, piercing cry or sound
definition: a high-pitched, piercing cry or sound
example: The eagle's sudden shriek pierced the silence of the canyon.
exampleHindi: चील की अचानक चीख ने घाटी के सन्नाटे को तोड़ दिया।

example: The canary loves to sing in the morning.
exampleHindi: कैनरी को सुबह गाना पसंद है।

meaning: a large aggressive seabird that often chases other birds to steal their food
definition: a large aggressive seabird that often chases other birds to steal their food
example: A skua harassed the smaller gulls to make them drop their catch.
exampleHindi: एक स्कुआ ने छोटे गल्स को उनका कैच छोड़ने के लिए परेशान किया।

meaning: a North American wild goose, typically entirely white except for black wingtips
definition: a North American wild goose, typically entirely white except for black wingtips
example: Thousands of snow geese gathered in the wetland during their migration.
exampleHindi: अपने प्रवास के दौरान हजारों हिम हंस आर्द्रभूमि में एकत्र हुए।

meaning: a small, stout, brownish-grey bird common in urban and rural areas

meaning: a loud, harsh, or discordant noise made by a bird, often a parrot or seagull
definition: a loud, harsh, or discordant noise made by a bird, often a parrot or seagull
example: The parrot let out a loud squawk when it was frightened.
exampleHindi: जब तोता डर गया तो उसने जोर से चीख निकाली।

meaning: a highly gregarious bird with dark, iridescent plumage

meaning: a small bird with long, pointed wings and a forked tail, known for swift flight
definition: a small bird with long, pointed wings and a forked tail, known for swift flight
example: The swallow swooped low over the water to catch an insect.
exampleHindi: निगल ने एक कीट को पकड़ने के लिए पानी के ऊपर ज़ोर से झपट्टा मारा।

meaning: a large aquatic bird with a long flexible neck, short legs, webbed feet, and typically white plumage

meaning: a small freshwater duck, often with a patch of bright color on the wings

example: A pair of green-winged teal paddled quietly among the reeds.

meaning: a seabird related to gulls, typically smaller and more slender, with a forked tail
definition: a seabird related to gulls, typically smaller and more slender, with a forked tail
example: The Arctic tern migrates further than any other bird.

meaning: a small or medium-sized songbird, typically having a brown back and spotted breast
definition: a small or medium-sized songbird, typically having a brown back and spotted breast

meaning: a tropical American bird with brightly colored plumage and a very large bill
definition: a tropical American bird with brightly colored plumage and a very large bill
example: The toucan used its massive beak to reach a ripe fruit.

meaning: a quavering or vibratory sound produced by some birds
definition: a quavering or vibratory sound produced by some birds

meaning: a tropical seabird with mainly white plumage and extremely long central tail feathers
definition: a tropical seabird with mainly white plumage and extremely long central tail feathers
example: The tropicbird's long tail streamed behind it as it flew over the reef.

meaning: the chirp of a small bird
definition: the chirp of a small bird
example: A gentle tweet came from the birdhouse.
exampleHindi: चिड़िया घर से एक सौम्य चहचहाहट आई।

meaning: a series of short, high-pitched calls or sounds
definition: a series of short, high-pitched calls or sounds
example: The cheerful twitter of birds filled the garden at dawn.
exampleHindi: भोर होते ही पक्षियों का हर्षित कलरव बगीचे में गूंज उठा।

example: Vultures were flying high in the sky.

meaning: a song or call characterized by a melodious trilling or quavering sound
